ocr_mistral.text:
No. 152.741 103.072

ACT OF JULY 14, 1862.

Rice Chambers.
Henderson Co. Ky.

Widow of
Aaron Chambers.
Priv. G. 118. U.S.C.T.
Died at Va.
Novr. 6th, 1864. "Dianhea".

Pension Office,
__________, 186__.

Respectfully referred to the Adjutant
General, for official evidence of service
and death.

Joseph H. Barrett
Commissioner.

Received, Sept. 24th, 1867.
Claimant
Henderson
Ky.
Attorney.
